name: Mocha Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Instant espresso powder or instant coffee granules
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, sprinkle the instant coffee over the chocolate chips.
2. Heat heavy cream and corn syrup in a saucepan over medium heat until they reach a simmer.
3. Pour the hot cream mixture over the chocolate and let it sit for 30 seconds.
4. Stir until smooth, then add the liqueur and blend well.
5. The sauce will cool to room temperature and be ready to serve once smooth.
6. Serve over Mocha Moons ice cream.
